data.title: GitHub boosts productivity with new issue management features: duplicate issues across repositories and create issues from any UI location.
data.description: GitHub has launched new features to improve workflow efficiency. These include the ability to duplicate issues across repositories and create issues from any part of the user interface. These updates aim to streamline processes and boost productivity for users on the platform.

data.title: DOGE reaches $0.25 with 7.83% daily gains, driven by whales and bullish signals, despite overbought status.
data.description: The price of DOGE has surged to $0.25, recording a 7.83% increase in daily gains. This increase is attributed to rallies driven by large investors (whales) and positive technical indicators. Despite being in an overbought state, the momentum suggests that there is still potential for further upward movement in the value of DOGE.

data.title: Solana's SOL hits $177 amid Pump's $600M ICO success & $500M Trump token unlock. RSI at 70.5, bullish tech indicators.
data.description: The value of SOL surged to $177 following Pump's successful $600 million ICO and the unlocking of $500 million worth of Trump tokens. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 70.5, indicating overbought market conditions, yet technical signals continue to show a positive outlook.

data.title: ADA price surges to $0.83 after EMURGO's Cardano Card launch & XRP Ledger integration plan; bullish trend observed.
data.description: Cardano's cryptocurrency ADA surged to $0.83 driven by a robust bullish trend following EMURGO's unveiling of the Cardano Card for real-world transactions. Additionally, EMURGO disclosed plans for Tokeo Wallet integration with the XRP Ledger.

data.title: GitHub improves 'Files Changed' page in public preview with better performance and usability for reviewing pull requests. ( Read more)
data.description: GitHub has announced enhancements to the 'Files Changed' page, now available for public preview. These improvements aim to boost performance and usability when reviewing pull requests. The changes promise to facilitate the process, providing a more efficient experience for users. The update is expected to reduce loading times by up to 30% and improve overall responsiveness. Users will find it easier to navigate and review changes, thanks to the revamped design and functionality. This update continues GitHub's commitment to enhancing user experience, with an emphasis on streamlining processes and increasing productivity.

data.title: XRP surges to record $3.45 fueled by GENIUS Act and whale gains, but experts warn of possible correction.
data.description: XRP has surged to an all-time high of $3.45 fueled by advancements in regulation and significant accumulation by whales. However, technical analysis points towards a possible correction looming in the market.

data.title: Data breach at Zumpano Patricios, P.A. exposes 279,275 patient records. Investigation underway. #privacyalert
data.description: Investigation is underway by the law firm Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP into a data breach that resulted in the unauthorized entry to the confidential data of 279,275 patients of healthcare providers associated with the law firm Zumpano Patricios, P.A. based in Florida.

data.title: Explore how GPU acceleration with NVIDIA cuDF transforms data processing, boosting performance on large datasets in three workflows.
data.description: Learn how leveraging NVIDIA cuDF for GPU acceleration can significantly improve pandas workflows, increasing performance on large datasets. Delve into three specific workflows that experience enhanced efficiency with this technology. Find out more about how this advancement is revolutionizing data processing.

data.title: BNB price jumps to $733 post $1B token burn and infrastructure upgrades, amidst BigONE breach. Bullish indicators noted.
data.description: Following Binance's token burn of $1 billion and infrastructure upgrades for BNB Chain, BNB has seen a significant rally in the market. Even with the recent security breach at BigONE, technical indicators are indicating a strong bullish momentum for BNB.

data.title: Astronomer CEO Andy Byron suspended after video exposes possible affair at Coldplay concert, sparking social media buzz.
data.description: A viral video capturing a concert has sparked widespread online conversation due to the humorous reactions of a visibly distressed man and woman who were inadvertently featured on camera. The clip garnered significant attention, amassing millions of views and thousands of comments as viewers humorously remarked on the couple's apparent displeasure. The video has since become a trending topic, with social media users sharing and reposting it across various platforms.

data.title: ETH reaches $3,675 in 6-month peak with 300K+ tokens amassed by institutions. BlackRock invests $499M. GENIUS Act offers stablecoin clarity. Technicals signal overbought state.
data.description: The price of Ethereum (ETH) has surged to a six-month high of $3,675 as institutional investors have been accumulating over 300,000 tokens. BlackRock, a major financial institution, has added $499 million to its holdings of ETH. The GENIUS Act has been introduced to provide clarity on regulations surrounding stablecoins. However, technical indicators suggest that the market is currently overbought.

data.title: NVIDIA uses JAX and XLA to boost large language model inference speed, cutting latency in GPU work by up to 30%.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled new strategies to decrease latency in processing large language models, utilizing JAX and XLA to enhance performance on GPU-powered tasks. This enhancement promises significant advancements in handling workloads efficiently.

data.title: Bitcoin surges over $120K fueled by institutional interest and pro-crypto laws, pushing market value above $4T.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has surged to record levels, exceeding $120,000, driven by increased institutional investment and positive regulatory changes in the United States. This surge has contributed to the overall cryptocurrency market reaching a valuation of over $4 trillion.

data.title: Georgia's Path2College 529 Plan reveals Sinclair Lewis from Mableton, GA, as the 2024 Newborn Sweepstakes winner.
data.description: In Atlanta, Georgia, the Path2College 529 Plan revealed that a newborn from Mableton, GA, named Sinclair Lewis, is the lucky winner of the 2024 Path2College Newborn Sweepstakes.

data.title: High-Trend International Group corrected its press release from July 17, 2025, for share capital restructure.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Singapore, High-Trend International Group, a global ocean technology company trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol HTCO, issued a correction to their press release from July 17, 2025. The update aimed to clarify the timeframe mentioned in the previous release.

data.title: Bitcoin enthusiast Peter McCormack aims to purchase a private security team after claiming police failed Bedford.
data.description: Peter McCormack, a Bitcoin enthusiast, has criticized the police in the town of Bedford, stating that they have not met expectations. McCormack believes he can provide better security by mobilizing his own security team.

data.title: UTH Florida University receives U.S. accreditation from DEAC, boosting global presence and quality commitment.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, UTH Florida University located in Miami received accreditation in the United States from the Distance Education Accrediting Commission (DEAC). This accreditation signifies a significant milestone for the university and underscores its dedication to providing high-quality education.

data.title: AIXA Miner offers a hassle-free route to daily passive income through AI cloud mining. Users invest in smart contracts for guaranteed earnings without owning hardware. 250 characters.
data.description: The article discusses how traditional cryptocurrency mining methods are becoming increasingly inaccessible due to high costs, technical barriers, and environmental concerns. AIXA Miner, a cloud mining platform, offers a solution by allowing users to earn daily passive income through AI-powered cloud mining without the need for physical hardware. Users invest in smart contracts to access computing power from AIXA's renewable-powered mining infrastructure, leading to guaranteed daily earnings and a full return of investment upon contract maturity. AIXA Miner simplifies the mining process in three steps: registration, selection of cloud mining contract, and passive earning through automated mining. The platform offers various investment plans for cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin, with transparent and guaranteed earnings. AIXA Miner provides tailored options for users to maximize returns and access high-yield mining contracts for predictable performance.

data.title: Elegoo showcases AI robots, glowing cosplay wings, at Open Sauce with 3D printed creations. #techinnovation
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in San Francesco, Elegoo, a fast-growing player in global smart manufacturing, announces its partnership with Open Sauce, a prominent event for makers, creators, and tech innovators. Elegoo will be present at Booth A15 and A16 at the San Mateo County Event Center. The collaboration will be showcased during the 3-day event.

data.title: DHS launches "Families on the Fly" campaign to improve checkpoint experience for traveling families.
data.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. - On July 18, 2025, the US Department of Homeland Security Secretary Noem introduced the "Families on the Fly" campaign, a new TSA initiative focused on improving the checkpoint experience for families traveling this summer. The program aims to provide better hospitality and service to travelers, particularly families, navigating security procedures. This initiative comes as part of efforts to enhance overall travel experiences, with a specific focus on families during the peak summer travel season.
